index.title: Smart resource scheduling for your company

index.ico3: Tracks every item individually throughout production
index.ico4: Generates a unique code for each item for easy search
index.ico5: Automatically models your production center workload
index.ico6: Assigns tasks and monitors execution in real time

manual.section1Text1: This section displays today's work plan, including scheduled times for each task.
manual.section1Text2: To view task details, click on the task. Inside, you'll see:
manual.result: Result — what you should get after completing the task.
manual.source: Source — materials and tools needed to complete the task.
manual.codesExplanation: Each source and result is assigned a unique code:
manual.codeM: Code starting with 'M' — a material taken from the warehouse.
manual.codeA: Code starting with 'A' — a result of another task.
manual.taskDescription: The task description contains instructions for execution.
manual.executorOneOrTwoButtons: Executor sees one button “Completed”, or two — “Ready” and “Defect” if there's no controller.
manual.executorWithControl: If the team has a controller, the executor only sees “Completed”, and the task is forwarded to the controller.
manual.controllerDecision: The controller then chooses either “Ready” or “Defect”.
manual.noController: If there’s no controller, the executor decides the task result.
manual.section2Text: This section contains guidance on how to work with the app.
manual.section3Text1: This section stores user information. You can change your name and password.
manual.section3Text2: Important: You can't change your email or login here. Only the team admin can delete your account.

mes.impossibleToDelStage: It is impossible to delete the stage because it contains operations. Please delete the operations from the stage first.
mes.impossibleToDelOperReady: It is impossible to delete the operation because it has performance results or defects.
mes.impossibleToDelOperHistory: It is impossible to delete the operation because there is scheduled or canceled execution time. You can change the operation status to 'canceled'.
mes.mailCodeSent: An email with a code has been sent to
mes.cardPerformed: The card has already been completed and there are no operations whose status can be changed!
mes.prePlanChanged: The preliminary scheduling of the operation and all dependent subsequent schedules have been successfully updated.
mes.erazeOperLoads: The scheduling of the operation and all dependent subsequent schedules have been successfully deleted.
mes.changeOperLoads: The scheduling of the operation and all dependent subsequent schedules have been successfully deleted.
mes.tCardPlaned: The card has been successfully pre-scheduled BUT NOT SAVED! If everything looks correct, PLEASE SAVE!
mes.tCardSaved: The card schedule has been successfully saved.
mes.tCardRead: The card has been successfully read.
mes.tCardRecorded: The card has been successfully recorded.
